free_text: Isospin and the Bohr independence hypothesis
#doi:10.1103/PhysRevC.5.463
A deltaE-E solid-state charged-particle
detection telescope was used. The two different
deltaE counters used are 45 and 55 mu-m thick.
OG
The target was self-supporting foil having the
thickness 0.515 mg/cm2. The target foil was rotated 30
degrees from the position normal to the beam.
No information on uncertainties.
Fig.5 in Phys.Rev.C,5,463,1972 was
digitized by GSYS2.4.7.
